artPrompt: The frozen instant of a friendly correction: a determined townswoman thrusts a casserole dish forward like a shield, steam curling, as a flipped coin hangs mid-spin above her in a blade of golden light, her other hand raised in a polite but unstoppable gesture. Foreshortened arm jutting toward the viewer, picket fence and leafy green crowd dissolving into warm shadow behind, high-contrast and kinetic. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: Swing the Vote
text:
Cast this spell only when the table is voting or a player is choosing among options for a spell or ability they control.
Change one vote or chosen option to the option you prefer. (You worked the room. Hands were shaken. It's done.)
flavorText: Whether the rival's coin is heads or tails, Petunia would just like to register a friendly correction.

extras.voting: change a vote or chosen option
